HGSS.068.0000:
Archer: Oh? You managed to get
this far...?\r
You must be quite the Trainer.\f
We intend to take over this
Radio Tower and officially announce\r
our comeback.\f
That should bring our boss Giovanni
back from his solitary training.\f
We are going to regain our
former glory...\f
I will not allow you to interfere with
our meticulous plans!\f
HGSS.068.0001:
Archer: How could this be...?\f
Our dreams have come to naught.
I was not up to the task after all.\f
Like Giovanni has done before me, I will
disband Team Rocket here today.\f
Farewell...\f
HGSS.068.0002:
Director: Oh...!\f
You have already defeated them?
Thank you!\f
Your courageous actions have saved
Pokémon nationwide.\f
You are well worth this.
Please take it!\f
HGSS.068.0005:
There used to be a tower right here.\f
When the tower was replaced with the
Radio Tower, that Rainbow Wing was\r
found at the top of the tower.\f
I heard from a friend from Cianwood City
that you can climb the Bell Tower in \r
Ecruteak City when you have a\r
Rainbow Wing.\f
I have to get back to my office.
See you!\f
HGSS.068.0006:
There used to be a tower right here.\f
When the tower was replaced with the
Radio Tower, that Silver Wing was found\r
at the top of the tower.\f
I heard from a friend from Cianwood City
that you can go down the cave at Whirl\r
Islands when you have a Silver Wing.\f
I have to get back to my office.
See you!\f
HGSS.068.0007:
Oh, I almost forgot!\f
According to my friend from Cianwood
City, the legendary Pokémon will not\r
appear if you just go up to the top of\r
the Bell Tower with only that\r
Rainbow Wing.\f
Apparently there is something else
you need... Or something like that.\f
I wonder what it was...\f
I can’t remember.\f
HGSS.068.0008:
Oh, I almost forgot!\f
According to my friend from Cianwood
City, the legendary Pokémon will not\r
appear if you just go down the cave at\r
Whirl Islands with only that\r
Silver Wing.\f
Apparently there is something else
you need... Or something like that.\f
I wonder what it was...\f
I can’t remember.\f
HGSS.068.0009:
Are you expecting something?
This is what they call Fake Out.\f
I really must go back to my office this
time. See ya!\f
